message:
fix(daemon): remove double execution by not calling _start during template init

Template init was calling _start to "initialize QuickJS", but with -e flag
_start runs the FULL user program. Since WAMR reapplies data sections during
instantiation (resetting all globals), any state from template init is lost
anyway. This caused programs to execute twice: once during CoW init, once
during actual run.

Now template init only captures memory layout for CoW (fast mmap allocation),
and _start is called only once during actual run.

Also refactors loadConfig() to use centralized config module (removes ~300
lines of duplicate parsing code).
